name: The Binding Song Ceremony

applicableSkills.application: Understanding the weave's response, adjusting resonance
Knowledge of the ceremony's ritual structure, invoking the Loom-Born
Rallying participants, maintaining morale during failures
Reading Threadline response, sensing the weave's reaction
Perceiving where the Song is weak and compensating
Recalling fragments of old verses, filling gaps with tradition

failureConsequences.effect: The ward-circle flickers. A Fray breeze passes through the village. Tension rises.
failureConsequences.mechanicalConsequence: No mechanical effect — narrative tension only

failureConsequences.effect: A thin-place phenomenon manifests inside the ward (fog, sound distortion, temperature drop).
failureConsequences.mechanicalConsequence: DC 12 Wisdom save for all participants or gain Frightened condition for 1 round

failureConsequences.effect: The ceremony fails. Ward strength decreases. During the Hollowing: 1d4 Looselings breach the ward.
failureConsequences.mechanicalConsequence: Ward strength drops per ward event table. Combat encounter may begin immediately.

criticalSuccessBonus: Flawless: ward strength +18 instead of +12 (+36 during Hollowing). All participants gain Inspiration. Brief vision of Threadlines brightening.
